name: langmartai
description: LM Assist — observability platform for Claude Code and Agent SDK

plugins.name: lm-assist
plugins.description: Monitor, debug, and control AI coding agents. Skills for session intelligence (observe, route), commands (/sessions, /summary, /run), 15 insight views per session, web terminal, project/session summaries, cross-project routing, prompt queue, auto-learning. Optional: MCP knowledge tools, context-injection hook.
